steps.title: Reduce the system to one line
steps.content: Multiply the first equation by $5$: $5(6x+5y)=5(4)$ gives $30x+25y=20$, which is identical to the second equation. Both equations describe the same line, $6x+5y=4$.

steps.title: Solve for x in terms of y
Confirm choice B
steps.content: The point is therefore $\left(-\frac{5r}{6}+\frac{2}{3}, r\right)$, which matches B.
